title: equisetum arvense subsp. agreste
intro: Equisetum arvense subsp. agreste is a type of horsetail plant, a vascular plant that belongs to the class Equisetopsida. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of urinary tract issues, kidney problems, and inflammation. The plant's extracts have been used to promote health benefits such as reducing the risk of kidney stones, alleviating symptoms of kidney disease, and supporting urinary tract health. Equisetum arvense subsp. agreste can be prepared as a herbal tea or supplement, often in combination with other herbs, to support overall health and well-being.
